en.tool.description: Delete the specified file or directory (directories are deleted recursively). Because this is dangerous, confirmation may be required.
en.tool.system_prompt: This tool performs the operation described by the tool name 'delete_file'.

ja.tool.description: （日本語）削除します the specified ファイル or ディレクトリ (ディレクトリ are deleted recursively). Because this is dangerous, confirmation may be required.
ja.tool.system_prompt: （日本語）This ツール performs the 操作 described by the ツール name 'delete_ファイル'.
